title: Cig Walk
description:
A quiet apocalypse. A dying world. One cigarette at a time.

In Cig Walk, you trudge through the frozen ruins of abandoned Russia — a place where civilization burned out long ago, but the snow still falls, and the wind still howls between dead apartment blocks. There are no missions. No miracles. Just the cold, the silence, and the soft glow of a cigarette ember marking another night survived.

Your goals?Find cigarettes to calm the nerves

Discover beer to stay warm and numb the world

Locate a safe corner to sleep where the wind can’t reach your bones

That's it. No hero story. No grand ending.
Just a man walking through the quiet end of humanity looking for a small reason to keep going.

FeaturesBleak and atmospheric winter wasteland

Slow, immersive walking gameplay — feel every step in the snow

Melancholic doomer tone — loneliness, coldness, and cigarettes

Abandoned towns and Soviet housing blocks

Wind, distant dogs, creaking metal, and Geiger ticks echo in the silence

Survival elements stripped to their bones — warmth, smoke, shelter

 A world with nothing but time, hunger, and your thoughts

No quests. No glory.
Just you, the cold, and the sound of boots crunching in the snow.

When the only thing left to look forward to is the next cigarette…
you walk.

Your purchase helps support a small development team and we thank you. Please enjoy an atmospheric experience in the cold post cold war era winterland.
description_short: A place where civilization burned out long ago, but the snow still falls, and the wind still howls between dead apartment blocks. There are no missions. No miracles. Just the cold, the silence, and the soft glow of a cigarette. Relax in this doomer walking simulator and smoke them if you got them.
